list.name: host
list.label: Host
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT ResourceAttributes['host.name'] FROM default.otel_metrics_sum WHERE ResourceAttributes['host.name'] != '' ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, concat(ResourceAttributes['host.name'], ' ', replaceOne(MetricName,'system.cpu.load_average.','')) AS series, avg(Value) AS value FROM default.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName IN ('system.cpu.load_average.1m','system.cpu.load_average.5m','system.cpu.load_average.15m') AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ResourceAttributes['host.name'] IN ($host) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, concat(ResourceAttributes['host.name'], ' ', Attributes['state']) AS series, avg(Value) AS bytes FROM default.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName='system.memory.usage' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ResourceAttributes['host.name'] IN ($host) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, series, bps FROM (SELECT TimeUnix, concat(ResourceAttributes['host.name'],' ',Attributes['device'],' ',Attributes['direction']) AS series, (Value - lagInFrame(Value) OVER w) / greatest(toUnixTimestamp(TimeUnix) - toUnixTimestamp(lagInFrame(TimeUnix) OVER w), 1) AS bps FROM default.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName='system.disk.io' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ResourceAttributes['host.name'] IN ($host) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY ResourceAttributes['host.name'], Attributes['device'], Attributes['direction'] ORDER BY TimeUnix)) WHERE bps >= 0 ORDER BY time

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, series, bps FROM (SELECT TimeUnix, concat(ResourceAttributes['host.name'],' ',Attributes['device'],' ',Attributes['direction']) AS series, (Value - lagInFrame(Value) OVER w) / greatest(toUnixTimestamp(TimeUnix) - toUnixTimestamp(lagInFrame(TimeUnix) OVER w), 1) AS bps FROM default.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName='system.network.io' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ResourceAttributes['host.name'] IN ($host) WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY ResourceAttributes['host.name'], Attributes['device'], Attributes['direction'] ORDER BY TimeUnix)) WHERE bps >= 0 ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, concat(ResourceAttributes['host.name'],' ',Attributes['mountpoint']) AS series, avg(Value) AS used_bytes FROM default.otel_metrics_sum WHERE MetricName='system.filesystem.usage' AND Attributes['state']='used' AND $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ResourceAttributes['host.name'] IN ($host) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time
